text.message: Solo?
Why are you not stealing from red
He’s clearly in first
I disagree
He has 4 points down with. Down devs
I think green is in the best position
And I’m ahead of him?
U seem to think I'm ahead of him
I don’t
You solod me and stole from me three timss
Im clearly well ahead of red
U would have been if you played instead of getting salty
Sure buddy
You’re lucky the bot has game sense
He would’ve had 6 ore sitting in his hand rn
Scratch that 9 ore
Really?
Through ing much? Lol
When you solod me and stole from me three times
And wonder why red is winning
Makes me laugh
I hope orange wins
can't bear green crying so much
